'''rawaja''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yodler|yodler]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-w-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yodler|yodler]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| rawaja
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræwæjæth|ræwæjæth]] || [[word:ræwæjæj|ræwæjæj]] || [[word:ræwæjæsh|ræwæjæsh]] || [[word:ræwæjæ|ræwæjæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:rawawajath|rawawajath]] || [[word:rawawajaj|rawawajaj]] || [[word:rawawajash|rawawajash]] || [[word:rawawaja|rawawaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:rawajath|rawajath]] || [[word:rawajaj|rawajaj]] || [[word:rawajash|rawajash]] || [[word:rawaja|rawaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:rawafjath|rawafjath]] || [[word:rawafjaj|rawafjaj]] || [[word:rawafjash|rawafjash]] || [[word:rawafjaf|rawafjaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rawajatha|rawajatha]] || [[word:rawajaja|rawajaja]] || [[word:rawajasha|rawajasha]] || [[word:rawajaka|rawajaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rawajath|rawajath]] || [[word:rawajaj|rawajaj]] || [[word:rawajash|rawajash]] || [[word:rawaja|rawaja]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rawajathal|rawajathal]] || [[word:rawajajal|rawajajal]] || [[word:rawajashal|rawajashal]] || [[word:rawajakal|rawajakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rawajathatha|rawajathatha]] || [[word:rawajajaja|rawajajaja]] || [[word:rawajashasha|rawajashasha]] || [[word:rawajaka|rawajaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rawajathan|rawajathan]] || [[word:rawajajan|rawajajan]] || [[word:rawajashan|rawajashan]] || [[word:rawajakan|rawajakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rawajathaoro|rawajathaoro]] || [[word:rawajajaoro|rawajajaoro]] || [[word:rawajashaoro|rawajashaoro]] || [[word:rawajakaoro|rawajakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
